meta.title: Upload Your Documents — Ingrid Ascanio, Miami Mortgage
meta.description: Securely send your loan documents to Ingrid Ascanio's team: share a Google Drive, Dropbox, or file link with your details so your file moves faster.

hero.title: Send your documents. Keep your file moving.
hero.body: This is the fast lane between you and my team. Tell us whose file it is and what you're sending, share your documents, and everything lands organized on our side — no email chains, nothing lost.

checklist.title: What we typically need
checklist.intro: Every file is different — send what you have, and we'll tell you if anything's missing. The usual list:
items: Last 2 pay stubs — or business returns if self-employed
W-2s or 1099s for the last 2 years
Bank statements for the last 2 months, all pages
Anything we specifically asked you for
checklist.tip: Tip: photos of documents are fine as long as all four corners are visible and the text is readable.

form.title: Send your documents
form.name: Borrower's full name
form.namePh: Name exactly as it appears on the loan
form.filesDrop: Drag files here — or tap to browse
form.filesHelp: PDF, JPG, PNG, HEIC, ZIP, DOC, XLS · up to 20 MB total
form.filesTooBig: Those files total more than 20 MB — remove some, zip them, or share a link below instead.
form.orLink: Prefer a link? Share one instead
form.linkPh: Paste a Google Drive, Dropbox, or WeTransfer share link
form.linkHelp: Put your files in a folder (or zip), get the share link, and paste it here. Make sure the link is set so anyone with it can view.
form.needSomething: Attach at least one file or paste a share link so we have something to receive.
form.notesPh: e.g. “Bank statements and W-2s for the Hollywood purchase” — anything that helps us file it right.
form.secureNote: For highly sensitive items — full tax returns, complete bank records — we may invite you to our secure application portal instead. If you'd rather not use a share link, call us and we'll set that up.
